cases.question: Who has the highest deposit?
cases.generated_sql:
SELECT c.customer_name, d.deposit_amount
FROM customers c
JOIN deposits d ON c.customer_id = d.customer_id
ORDER BY d.deposit_amount DESC
LIMIT 1
cases.ground_truth_sql: SELECT c.customer_name, d.deposit_amount FROM customers c JOIN deposits d ON c.customer_id = d.customer_id ORDER BY d.deposit_amount DESC LIMIT 1;

cases.question: Who has the lowest deposit?
cases.generated_sql:
SELECT c.customer_name, d.deposit_amount
FROM customers c
JOIN deposits d ON c.customer_id = d.customer_id
ORDER BY d.deposit_amount ASC
LIMIT 1
cases.ground_truth_sql: SELECT c.customer_name, d.deposit_amount FROM customers c JOIN deposits d ON c.customer_id = d.customer_id ORDER BY d.deposit_amount ASC LIMIT 1;

cases.question: Who are the top 3 customers by deposit amount?
cases.generated_sql:
SELECT c.customer_name, d.deposit_amount
FROM customers c
JOIN deposits d ON c.customer_id = d.customer_id
ORDER BY d.deposit_amount DESC
LIMIT 3
cases.ground_truth_sql: SELECT c.customer_name, d.deposit_amount FROM customers c JOIN deposits d ON c.customer_id = d.customer_id ORDER BY d.deposit_amount DESC LIMIT 3;

cases.question: Who are the top 2 customers in Taipei Branch by deposit amount?
cases.generated_sql:
SELECT c.customer_name, d.deposit_amount
FROM customers c
JOIN deposits d ON c.customer_id = d.customer_id
JOIN branches b ON c.branch_id = b.branch_id
WHERE b.branch_name = 'Taipei Branch'
ORDER BY d.deposit_amount DESC
LIMIT 2
cases.ground_truth_sql: SELECT c.customer_name, d.deposit_amount FROM customers c JOIN deposits d ON c.customer_id = d.customer_id JOIN branches b ON c.branch_id = b.branch_id WHERE b.branch_name = 'Taipei Branch' ORDER BY d.deposit_amount DESC LIMIT 2;

cases.question: What is the total deposit amount in each branch?
cases.generated_sql: SELECT b.branch_name, SUM(d.deposit_amount) AS total_deposit FROM branches b JOIN customers c ON b.branch_id = c.branch_id JOIN deposits d ON c.customer_id = d.customer_id GROUP BY b.branch_name ORDER BY total_deposit DESC;
cases.ground_truth_sql: SELECT b.branch_name, SUM(d.deposit_amount) AS total_deposit FROM branches b JOIN customers c ON b.branch_id = c.branch_id JOIN deposits d ON c.customer_id = d.customer_id GROUP BY b.branch_name ORDER BY total_deposit DESC;

cases.question: What is the average deposit amount managed by each relationship manager?
cases.generated_sql:
SELECT rm.rm_name, AVG(d.deposit_amount) AS avg_deposit
FROM relationship_managers rm
JOIN customers c ON rm.rm_id = c.rm_id
JOIN deposits d ON c.customer_id = d.customer_id
GROUP BY rm.rm_name
ORDER BY avg_deposit DESC;
cases.ground_truth_sql: SELECT rm.rm_name, AVG(d.deposit_amount) AS avg_deposit FROM relationship_managers rm JOIN customers c ON rm.rm_id = c.rm_id JOIN deposits d ON c.customer_id = d.customer_id GROUP BY rm.rm_name ORDER BY avg_deposit DESC;

cases.question: Which RM has the highest average deposit?
cases.generated_sql:
SELECT rm.rm_name
FROM relationship_managers rm
JOIN customers c ON rm.rm_id = c.rm_id
JOIN deposits d ON c.customer_id = d.customer_id
GROUP BY rm.rm_name
ORDER BY AVG(d.deposit_amount) DESC
LIMIT 1
cases.ground_truth_sql: SELECT rm.rm_name FROM relationship_managers rm JOIN customers c ON rm.rm_id = c.rm_id JOIN deposits d ON c.customer_id = d.customer_id GROUP BY rm.rm_name ORDER BY AVG(d.deposit_amount) DESC LIMIT 1;

cases.question: Which branch has the most customers?
cases.generated_sql:
SELECT b.branch_name
FROM branches b
JOIN customers c ON b.branch_id = c.branch_id
GROUP BY b.branch_name
ORDER BY COUNT(c.customer_id) DESC
LIMIT 1
cases.ground_truth_sql: SELECT b.branch_name FROM branches b JOIN customers c ON b.branch_id = c.branch_id GROUP BY b.branch_name ORDER BY COUNT(c.customer_id) DESC LIMIT 1;

cases.question: Which branch has the highest total deposit?
cases.generated_sql:
SELECT b.branch_name
FROM branches b
JOIN customers c ON b.branch_id = c.branch_id
JOIN deposits d ON c.customer_id = d.customer_id
GROUP BY b.branch_name
ORDER BY SUM(d.deposit_amount) DESC
LIMIT 1
cases.ground_truth_sql: SELECT b.branch_name FROM branches b JOIN customers c ON b.branch_id = c.branch_id JOIN deposits d ON c.customer_id = d.customer_id GROUP BY b.branch_name ORDER BY SUM(d.deposit_amount) DESC LIMIT 1;

cases.question: Which customers are managed by Alice Chen?
cases.generated_sql:
SELECT c.customer_name
FROM customers c
JOIN relationship_managers rm ON c.rm_id = rm.rm_id
WHERE rm.rm_name = 'Alice Chen'
cases.ground_truth_sql: SELECT c.customer_name FROM customers c JOIN relationship_managers rm ON c.rm_id = rm.rm_id WHERE rm.rm_name = 'Alice Chen' ORDER BY c.customer_name ASC;

cases.question: Which customers are in Taipei Branch?
cases.generated_sql:
SELECT c.customer_name
FROM customers c
JOIN branches b ON c.branch_id = b.branch_id
WHERE b.branch_name = 'Taipei Branch';
cases.ground_truth_sql: SELECT c.customer_name FROM customers c JOIN branches b ON c.branch_id = b.branch_id WHERE b.branch_name = 'Taipei Branch' ORDER BY c.customer_name ASC;

cases.question: Which deposits are above 5000000?
cases.generated_sql: SELECT c.customer_name, d.deposit_amount FROM customers c JOIN deposits d ON c.customer_id = d.customer_id JOIN branches b ON c.branch_id = b.branch_id WHERE b.branch_name = 'Taipei Branch' ORDER BY d.deposit_amount DESC LIMIT 10;
cases.ground_truth_sql: SELECT c.customer_name, d.deposit_amount FROM customers c JOIN deposits d ON c.customer_id = d.customer_id WHERE d.deposit_amount > 5000000 ORDER BY d.deposit_amount DESC;

cases.question: How many customers are in each branch?
cases.generated_sql:
SELECT b.branch_name, COUNT(c.customer_id) AS customer_count
FROM branches b
JOIN customers c ON b.branch_id = c.branch_id
GROUP BY b.branch_name
cases.ground_truth_sql: SELECT b.branch_name, COUNT(c.customer_id) AS customer_count FROM branches b JOIN customers c ON b.branch_id = c.branch_id GROUP BY b.branch_name ORDER BY customer_count DESC, b.branch_name ASC;

cases.question: Which relationship managers work in Taipei Branch?
cases.generated_sql:

FROM relationship_managers rm
JOIN branches b ON rm.branch_id = b.branch_id
WHERE b.branch_name = 'Taipei Branch';

cases.question: Which customers in Kaohsiung Branch have deposits above 3000000?
cases.generated_sql:
SELECT c.customer_name, d.deposit_amount
FROM customers c
JOIN deposits d ON c.customer_id = d.customer_id
JOIN branches b ON c.branch_id = b.branch_id
WHERE b.branch_name = 'Kaohsiung Branch'
  AND d.deposit_amount > 3000000;
cases.ground_truth_sql: SELECT c.customer_name, d.deposit_amount FROM customers c JOIN branches b ON c.branch_id = b.branch_id JOIN deposits d ON c.customer_id = d.customer_id WHERE b.branch_name = 'Kaohsiung Branch' AND d.deposit_amount > 3000000 ORDER BY d.deposit_amount DESC;
